mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-order-receive-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceOutboundHeaderList - 출고 헤더 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , SOHDKEY AS ORHDKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , CLAIMNO , ORHDDATE AS OBHDDAY , OBHDTYPECD , OBREQDATE , DLVYTYPECD , TOCTKEY , STOREKEY , DLVYFORMCD , NISCNLRNGCD , ORDPRSNNM , RCPPRSNNM , RCPPRSNTELNO , RCPPRSNTELNO2 , RCPPRSNZIPCD , RCPPRSNADDR1 , RCPPRSNADDR2 , DLVYMSG , CHNLID , CMT , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_OB_HD_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PRCSYN = 'N' AND TO_DATE(RCVDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + INTERVAL '1' DAY > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

/* wms-outbound-order-receive-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceOutboundDetailList - 출고 상세 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , SOHDKEY AS ORHDKEY , SODTKEY AS ORDTKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AS EXTERNORDERLINENUM , ICKEY , ICUNITKEY , INITQTY , EXQTY AS EXPCTQTY , UOM , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_OB_DT_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SOHDKEY = #{orhdkey} ORDER BY SOHDKEY, CAST(SODTKEY AS NUMERIC)
